g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about mobile apps in a tech stack')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about web browsers in a tech stack')
sendPrompt('How does a chatbot integrate into a web app?')
sendPrompt('What does Node.js do in a web stack?')
sendPrompt('How does a chatbot backend work?')
sendPrompt('What is n8n and how does it work?')
sendPrompt('What is a REST or GraphQL API?')
sendPrompt('What databases are common in web apps?')
sendPrompt('How does Python and TensorFlow fit into a web app?')
sendPrompt('What cloud services does AWS provide?')
